user.title: Private HACS
user.description:
Paste a GitHub Personal Access Token. Two ways to create one:

- **[Classic PAT (pre-filled with 'repo' scope)](https://github.com/settings/tokens/new?scopes=repo&description=Private+HACS)** — works for any private repo your account can access.
- **[Fine-grained PAT](https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new)** — more secure: scope it to only the specific repos you want to install, with **Repository permissions → Contents: Read-only**.

The token is stored in Home Assistant's encrypted config store.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Private HACS
reauth_confirm.description: The current GitHub token is no longer valid. Paste a new one. You can [create a classic PAT](https://github.com/settings/tokens/new?scopes=repo&description=Private+HACS) or a [fine-grained PAT](https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new).

data.ref: Tag / branch / commit (required for tag, branch, commit)

manage_repository.title: Pick a tracked repository
manage_repository.description: Choose which repository to act on.

repository_action.title: {repo}
repository_action.description:
Pick an action. Install / update writes to `custom_components/` and requires a Home Assistant restart to take effect.

{detail}

installed_confirmation.title: Installed
installed_confirmation.description:
**{repo}** is installed as `custom_components/{integration}/` (version: `{version}`).

## Restart required

Home Assistant must be **restarted** for the new integration to load. The files are on disk but not yet active.

Go to **Developer Tools → YAML → Restart**, or use the system menu.

Click **Submit** to close this dialog.

update_token.title: Update GitHub token
update_token.description: Replace the stored token with a new Personal Access Token.

error.install_failed: Repository was added but install failed: {detail}

abort.no_repositories: No repositories are tracked yet. Add one first.

add_repository.name: Add repository
add_repository.description: Track a GitHub repository so it can be installed and kept up to date.

remove_repository.name: Remove repository
remove_repository.description: Stop tracking a repository and delete its installed files.

install.description: Download a tracked repository and write it into custom_components/.
